steps.question:
Welcome to BKG International School, Khargone

Hello!

Thank you for contacting BKG International School.

We are committed to providing quality education and a bright future for every child.

Please choose an option below:
steps.fallbackResponse: Please choose a valid option: Admission Inquiry, Fee Structure, About School, Transport Facility, Talk to Our Team, School Photos & Videos, School Location, or Contact Us.

options.label: Admission Inquiry
options.response: Thank you for your interest in admission.

options.label: Fee Structure
options.response: Please share your mobile number. Our Admission Team will share the latest fee details.

options.label: About the School
options.response:
Why Choose BKG International School?

- CBSE Curriculum
- Smart Classrooms
- Computer Lab
- Science Lab
- Library Facility
- Sports & Co-Curricular Activities
- Experienced Teachers
- Safe & Secure Campus

Location: Beed Fata, Sanawad Road, Khargone, Madhya Pradesh, 451001
Contact: +919826763101

options.label: Transport Facility
options.response: School bus service is available in selected areas.

options.label: School Photos & Videos
options.response: School photos and campus video will be shared by our team shortly.
